legacy_v0_label_definition.status: retired sensitivity diagnostic; not part of the maintained API
legacy_v0_label_definition.threshold_label: legacy reachability verdict calibrated with 200 target shuffles per target
legacy_v0_label_definition.proxy_label: dominant component from staged non-negative fits to E and then -E

interpretation: magnitude_ratio<1 => measured double SHORTER than additive sum (saturation) => additive cone conservative
